API docs by Redocly

Ruins Editor API (0.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Items

Items_list

アイテム一覧取得

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/items

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "spriteSheetName": "string",
      • "spriteKey": "string",
      • "animKeys": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "value": 99999,
      • "weight": 1000,
      • "inflictsDamage": 9999,
      • "providesNutrition": 9999,
      • "stackable": true,
      • "consumable": {
        • "usableScene": "BATTLE",
        • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
        • "targetNum": "SINGLE"
        },
      • "providesHealing": {
        • "valueType": "PERCENTAGE",
        • "amount": 9999,
        • "ratio": 1
        },
      • "wearable": {
        • "defense": 999,
        • "equipmentCategory": "HEAD",
        • "insulationCold": -100,
        • "insulationHeat": -100
        },
      • "equipBonus": {
        • "vitality": -100,
        • "strength": -100,
        • "sensation": -100,
        • "dexterity": -100,
        • "agility": -100
        },
      • "ammo": {
        • "ammoTag": "9mm",
        • "damageBonus": -100,
        • "accuracyBonus": -100
        },
      • "melee": {
        • "accuracy": 100,
        • "damage": 9999,
        • "attackCount": 1,
        • "element": "NONE",
        • "attackCategory": "FIST",
        • "cost": 100,
        • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
        • "targetNum": "SINGLE"
        },
      • "fire": {
        • "accuracy": 100,
        • "damage": 9999,
        • "attackCount": 1,
        • "element": "NONE",
        • "attackCategory": "FIST",
        • "cost": 100,
        • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
        • "targetNum": "SINGLE",
        • "magazineSize": 1,
        • "reloadEffort": 1,
        • "ammoTag": "9mm"
        },
      • "book": {
        • "totalEffort": 1,
        • "skill": {
          • "targetSkill": "string",
          • "requiredLevel": 100,
          • "maxLevel": 100
          }
        },
      • "material": true
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0
}

Items_create

アイテム作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

description
required
string (EntityDescription) [ 1 .. 200 ] characters

説明文

spriteSheetName
required
string (SpriteSheetName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトシート名

spriteKey
required
string (SpriteKey) [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトキー

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
value
required
integer <int32> (ItemValue) [ 0 .. 99999 ]

売買価格

weight
number <double> (ItemWeight) [ 0 .. 1000 ]

アイテム重量（kg）

inflictsDamage
integer <int32> (BaseDamage) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

基本ダメージ

providesNutrition
integer <int32> (NutritionAmount) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

栄養価

stackable
boolean (Stackable)

スタック可能かどうか

object (Consumable)

消費可能アイテムの設定

object (ProvidesHealing)

回復効果

object (Wearable)

装備可能設定

object (EquipBonus)

装備ボーナス

object (Ammo)

弾薬設定

object (Melee)

近接攻撃設定

object (Fire)

遠距離攻撃設定

object (Book)

本の設定

material
boolean

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/items

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "spriteSheetName": "string",
  • "spriteKey": "string",
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "value": 99999,
  • "weight": 1000,
  • "inflictsDamage": 9999,
  • "providesNutrition": 9999,
  • "stackable": true,
  • "consumable": {
    • "usableScene": "BATTLE",
    • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
    • "targetNum": "SINGLE"
    },
  • "providesHealing": {
    • "valueType": "PERCENTAGE",
    • "amount": 9999,
    • "ratio": 1
    },
  • "wearable": {
    • "defense": 999,
    • "equipmentCategory": "HEAD",
    • "insulationCold": -100,
    • "insulationHeat": -100
    },
  • "equipBonus": {
    • "vitality": -100,
    • "strength": -100,
    • "sensation": -100,
    • "dexterity": -100,
    • "agility": -100
    },
  • "ammo": {
    • "ammoTag": "9mm",
    • "damageBonus": -100,
    • "accuracyBonus": -100
    },
  • "melee": {
    • "accuracy": 100,
    • "damage": 9999,
    • "attackCount": 1,
    • "element": "NONE",
    • "attackCategory": "FIST",
    • "cost": 100,
    • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
    • "targetNum": "SINGLE"
    },
  • "fire": {
    • "accuracy": 100,
    • "damage": 9999,
    • "attackCount": 1,
    • "element": "NONE",
    • "attackCategory": "FIST",
    • "cost": 100,
    • "targetGroup": "ENEMY",
    • "targetNum": "SINGLE",
    • "magazineSize": 1,
    • "reloadEffort": 1,
    • "ammoTag": "9mm"
    },
  • "book": {
    • "totalEffort": 1,
    • "skill": {
      • "targetSkill": "string",
      • "requiredLevel": 100,
      • "maxLevel": 100
      }
    },
  • "material": true
}

index
required
integer <int32>

Responses

index

required
name

Items_delete

アイテム削除

path Parameters
index
required
integer <int32>

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/items/{index}

Response samples

  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string"
}

Members

Members_list

メンバー一覧取得

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/members

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "player": true,
      • "isBoss": true,
      • "abilities": {
        • "vitality": -100,
        • "strength": -100,
        • "sensation": -100,
        • "dexterity": -100,
        • "agility": -100,
        • "defense": -100
        },
      • "spriteSheetName": "string",
      • "spriteKey": "string",
      • "animKeys": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "lightSource": {
        • "radius": 1,
        • "color": {
          • "r": 0,
          • "g": 0,
          • "b": 0,
          • "a": 0
          },
        • "enabled": true
        },
      • "factionType": "FactionNeutral",
      • "combatPolicy": "attack",
      • "movementPattern": "random",
      • "viewDistance": 1,
      • "dialog": {
        • "messageKey": "string"
        },
      • "commandTableName": "string",
      • "dropTableName": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0
}

Members_create

メンバー作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

player
boolean (IsPlayer)

プレイヤーキャラクターかどうか

isBoss
required
boolean (IsBoss)

ボスモンスターかどうか

required
object (Abilities)

能力値

spriteSheetName
required
string (SpriteSheetName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトシート名

spriteKey
required
string (SpriteKey) [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトキー

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
object (LightSource)

光源設定

factionType
string (FactionMemberType)
Value: "FactionNeutral"

派閥タイプ

combatPolicy
string (CombatPolicyType)
Enum: "attack" "evade" "ignore"

戦闘ポリシー。エンティティの戦闘時の行動方針を定義する

movementPattern
string (MovementPatternType)
Enum: "random" "patrol" "wallHug" "stationary" "wander" "territorial" "swarm"

非戦闘時の移動パターン

viewDistance
integer <int32> (ViewDistance) [ 1 .. 100 ]

AI視界距離（タイル単位）

object (Dialog)

会話データ

commandTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

dropTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/members

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "player": true,
  • "isBoss": true,
  • "abilities": {
    • "vitality": -100,
    • "strength": -100,
    • "sensation": -100,
    • "dexterity": -100,
    • "agility": -100,
    • "defense": -100
    },
  • "spriteSheetName": "string",
  • "spriteKey": "string",
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "lightSource": {
    • "radius": 1,
    • "color": {
      • "r": 0,
      • "g": 0,
      • "b": 0,
      • "a": 0
      },
    • "enabled": true
    },
  • "factionType": "FactionNeutral",
  • "combatPolicy": "attack",
  • "movementPattern": "random",
  • "viewDistance": 1,
  • "dialog": {
    • "messageKey": "string"
    },
  • "commandTableName": "string",
  • "dropTableName": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • default

{

メンバー更新

path Parameters
index
required
integer <int32>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

player
boolean (IsPlayer)

プレイヤーキャラクターかどうか

isBoss
required
boolean (IsBoss)

ボスモンスターかどうか

required
object (Abilities)

能力値

spriteSheetName
required
string (SpriteSheetName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトシート名

spriteKey
required
string (SpriteKey) [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

スプライトキー

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
object (LightSource)

光源設定

factionType
string (FactionMemberType)
Value: "FactionNeutral"

派閥タイプ

combatPolicy
string (CombatPolicyType)
Enum: "attack" "evade" "ignore"

戦闘ポリシー。エンティティの戦闘時の行動方針を定義する

movementPattern
string (MovementPatternType)
Enum: "random" "patrol" "wallHug" "stationary" "wander" "territorial" "swarm"

非戦闘時の移動パターン

viewDistance
integer <int32> (ViewDistance) [ 1 .. 100 ]

AI視界距離（タイル単位）

object (Dialog)

会話データ

commandTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

dropTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/members/{index}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "player": true,
  • "isBoss": true,
  • "abilities": {
    • "vitality": -100,
    • "strength": -100,
    • "sensation": -100,
    • "dexterity": -100,
    • "agility": -100,
    • "defense": -100
    },
  • "spriteSheetName": "string",
  • "spriteKey": "string",
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "lightSource": {
    • "radius": 1,
    • "color": {
      • "r": 0,
      • "g": 0,
      • "b": 0,
      • "a": 0
      },
    • "enabled": true
    },
  • "factionType": "FactionNeutral",
  • "combatPolicy": "attack",
  • "movementPattern": "random",
  • "viewDistance": 1,
  • "dialog": {
    • "messageKey": "string"
    },
  • "commandTableName": "string",
  • "dropTableName": "string"
}

Tiles

Tiles_list

タイル一覧取得

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/tiles

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "blockPass": true,
      • "blockView": true,
      • "spriteRender": {
        • "spriteSheetName": "string",
        • "spriteKey": "string",
        • "depth": 0
        },
      • "shelter": 0,
      • "water": 0,
      • "foliage": 0
      }
    ],
  • "totalCount": 0
}

Tiles_create

タイル作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

description
required
string (EntityDescription) [ 1 .. 200 ] characters

説明文

blockPass
required
boolean (BlocksPassage)

通行を妨げるかどうか

blockView
required
boolean (BlocksView)

視線を遮るかどうか

required
object (SpriteRender)

スプライトレンダー設定

shelter
required
number (ShelterType)
Enum: 0 5 10

遮蔽タイプ

water
required
number (WaterType)
Enum: 0 -5 -10

水タイプ

foliage
required
number (FoliageType)
Enum: 0 -1 -3

植生タイプ

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/tiles

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "blockPass": true,
  • "blockView": true,
  • "spriteRender": {
    • "spriteSheetName": "string",
    • "spriteKey": "string",
    • "depth": 0
    },
  • "shelter": 0,
  • "water": 0,
  • "foliage": 0
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "blockPass": true,
  • "blockView": true,
  • "spriteRender": {
    • "spriteSheetName": "string",
    • "spriteKey": "string",
    • "depth": 0
    },
  • "shelter": 0,
  • "water": 0,
  • "foliage": 0
}

application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "spriteRender": {
        • "spriteSheetName": "string",
        • "spriteKey": "string",
        • "depth": 0
        },
      • "animKeys": [
        • "string"

      • "hp": 1,

        • "radius": 1,

          • "r": 0,
          • "g": 0,
          • "b": 0,
          • "a": 0
          },
        • "enabled": true
        },

      • "doorLockTrigger": { },
      • "warpNextTrigger": { },
      • "warpEscapeTrigger": { },
      • "dungeonGateTrigger": { },

  • "totalCount": 0
}

Props_create

置物作成

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string (EntityName) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

エンティティ名

description
required
string (EntityDescription) [ 1 .. 200 ] characters

説明文

required
object (SpriteRender)

スプライトレンダー設定

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
blockPass
required
boolean (BlocksPassage)

通行を妨げるかどうか

blockView
required
boolean (BlocksView)

視線を遮るかどうか

passCost
integer <int32> (PassCost) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

通行コスト加算値。0で変化なし、50でベースコスト+50

hp
integer <int32> (HitPoints) [ 1 .. 9999 ]

耐久値。設定すると破壊可能になる

object (LightSource)

光源設定

door
object (DoorRaw)

扉ローデータ

doorLockTrigger
object (DoorLockTriggerRaw)

扉ロックトリガー

warpNextTrigger
object (WarpNextTriggerRaw)

次階層ワープトリガー

warpEscapeTrigger
object (WarpEscapeTriggerRaw)

脱出ワープトリガー

dungeonGateTrigger
object (DungeonGateTriggerRaw)

ダンジョン選択ゲートトリガー

object (StorageRaw)

収納ローデータ

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/props

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "spriteRender": {
    • "spriteSheetName": "string",
    • "spriteKey": "string",
    • "depth": 0
    },
  • "animKeys": [
    • "string"
    ],

  • "blockView": true,

    • "radius": 1,
    • "color": {
      • "r": 0,
      • "g": 0,
      • "b": 0,
      • "a": 0
      },
    • "enabled": true
    },
  • "door": { },
  • "doorLockTrigger": { },
  • "warpNextTrigger": { },
  • "warpEscapeTrigger": { },
  • "dungeonGateTrigger": { },
  • "storage": {
    • "maxWeight": 1000,

    }
}

required
id

string (ProfessionId) [ 1 .. 50 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

description
required

Palettes_delete

パレット削除

path Parameters
id
required
string

Responses

Development server

http://localhost:8080/api/v1/palettes/{id}

Response samples

  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string"
}

Models

Abilities

vitality
required
integer <int32> (Vitality) [ -100 .. 100 ]

体力。HPに影響する

strength
required
integer <int32> (Strength) [ -100 .. 100 ]

筋力。物理ダメージに影響する

sensation
required
integer <int32> (Sensation) [ -100 .. 100 ]

感覚。命中率と回避率に影響する

dexterity
required
integer <int32> (Dexterity) [ -100 .. 100 ]

器用さ。クリティカル率に影響する

agility
required
integer <int32> (Agility) [ -100 .. 100 ]

敏捷性。行動順に影響する

defense
required
integer <int32> (Defense) [ -100 .. 100 ]

防御力。被ダメージを軽減する

{
  • "vitality": -100,
  • "strength": -100,
  • "sensation": -100,
  • "dexterity": -100,
  • "agility": -100,
  • "defense": -100
}

Accuracy

integer <int32> (Accuracy) [ 0 .. 100 ]

命中率。0で必中なし、100で必中

100

AccuracyBonus

integer <int32> (AccuracyBonus) [ -100 .. 100 ]

Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
object (LightSource)

光源設定

factionType
string (FactionMemberType)
Value: "FactionNeutral"

派閥タイプ

combatPolicy
string (CombatPolicyType)
Enum: "attack" "evade" "ignore"

戦闘ポリシー。エンティティの戦闘時の行動方針を定義する

movementPattern
string (MovementPatternType)
Enum: "random" "patrol" "wallHug" "stationary" "wander" "territorial" "swarm"

非戦闘時の移動パターン

viewDistance
integer <int32> (ViewDistance) [ 1 .. 100 ]

AI視界距離（タイル単位）

object (Dialog)

会話データ

commandTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

dropTableName
string [ 1 .. 50 ] characters

プレイヤーキャラクターでは省略可能

{
  • "name": "string",
  • "player": true,
  • "isBoss": true,
  • "abilities": {
    • "vitality": -100,
    • "strength": -100,
    • "sensation": -100,
    • "dexterity": -100,

    • "defense": -100

    • "string"
    ],

    • "radius": 1,
    • "color": {
      • "r": 0,
      • "g": 0,
      • "b": 0,
      • "a": 0
      },
    • "enabled": true
    },

  • "viewDistance": 1,
  • "dialog": {
    • "messageKey": "string"
    },
  • "commandTableName": "string",
  • "dropTableName": "string"
}

MessageKey

string (MessageKey) [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$

"string"

MovementPatternType

string (MovementPatternType)
Enum: "random" "patrol" "wallHug" "stationary" "wander" "territorial" "swarm"

"random"

スプライトレンダー設定

animKeys
Array of strings (SpriteKey) [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$ ]
blockPass
required
boolean (BlocksPassage)

通行を妨げるかどうか

blockView
required
boolean (BlocksView)

視線を遮るかどうか

passCost
integer <int32> (PassCost) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

通行コスト加算値。0で変化なし、50でベースコスト+50

hp
integer <int32> (HitPoints) [ 1 .. 9999 ]

耐久値。設定すると破壊可能になる

object (LightSource)

光源設定

door
object (DoorRaw)

扉ローデータ

doorLockTrigger
object (DoorLockTriggerRaw)

warpNextTrigger

warpEscapeTrigger

dungeonGateTrigger

ProvidesHealing

valueType
required
string (HealingValueType)
Enum: "PERCENTAGE" "ABSOLUTE" "NUMERAL"

回復量の計算方式

amount
required
integer <int32> (HealAmount) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

回復固定量

ratio
required
number <double> (HealRatio) [ 0 .. 1 ]

回復割合。0.0〜1.0

  • "valueType": "PERCENTAGE",
  • "amount": 9999,
  • "ratio": 1
}

string (SaveData.AttackRangeType)
Enum: "MELEE" "RANGED"

攻撃射程。types.tspに対応するenumがないためセーブ固有で定義する

"MELEE"

SaveData.FireComponent

Accuracy
required
integer <int32> (Accuracy) [ 0 .. 100 ]

命中率。0で必中なし、100で必中

Damage
required
integer <int32> (BaseDamage) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

基本ダメージ

AttackCount
required
integer <int32> (AttackCount) [ 1 .. 10 ]

1ターンあたりの攻撃回数

Element
required
string (Element)

object (SaveData.AttackCategoryData)

required
integer <int32> (ActionCost) [ 0 .. 100 ]

required
object (SaveData.TargetTypeData)

required
integer <int32> >= 0

MagazineSize
required
integer <int32> [ 1 .. 100 ]

required
integer <int32> [ 1 .. 100 ]

AmmoTag
required
string

required
integer <int32> [ -100 .. 100 ]

integer <int32> [ -100 .. 100 ]

SaveData.HealNumeral

integer <int32> (SaveData.HealNumeral) >= 0

固定回復量

0
0

SaveData.HealingAmountData

type
required
string
Enum: "ratio" "numeral"

回復量の計算方式

ratio
number <double> [ 0 .. 1 ]

最大HPに対する回復割合 (0.0-1.0)。typeが"ratio"の場合に使用する

numeral
integer <int32> >= 0

固定回復量。typeが"numeral"の場合に使用する

{
  • "type": "ratio",
  • "ratio": 1,
  • "numeral": 0
}

SaveData.HealingAmountType

string (SaveData.HealingAmountType)
Enum: "ratio" "numeral"

回復量の計算方式。types.tspのHealingValueTypeとは値が異なるためセーブ固有で定義する

"ratio"

SaveData.HealthCondition

Type
required
string

状態の種類

Severity
required
integer <int32>

重症度

Timer
required
number <double>

進行度タイマー

Array of objects (SaveData.StatEffect)

この状態によるステータスへの影響

{
  • "Type": "string",
  • "Severity": 0,
  • "Timer": 0.1,
  • "Effects": [
    • {
      • "Stat": "string",
      • "Value": 0
      }
    ]
}

required
Array of objects (SaveData.BodyPartHealth)

          • "Type": "string",
          • "Severity": 0,
          • "Timer": 0.1,
          • "Effects": [
            • {
              • "Stat": "string",
              • "Value": 0
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
}

SaveData.MarkerComponent

object (SaveData.MarkerComponent)

{ }

SaveData.MaterialName

string (SaveData.MaterialName)

レシピ素材名

"string"

SaveData.MeleeComponent

Accuracy
required
integer <int32> (Accuracy) [ 0 .. 100 ]

命中率。0で必中なし、100で必中

Damage
required
integer <int32> (BaseDamage) [ 0 .. 9999 ]

基本ダメージ

AttackCount
required
integer <int32> (AttackCount) [ 1 .. 10 ]

1ターンあたりの攻撃回数

Element
required
string (Element)
Enum: "NONE" "FIRE" "THUNDER" "CHILL" "PHOTON"

攻撃属性

required
object (SaveData.AttackCategoryData)

攻撃種別

Cost
required
integer <int32> (ActionCost) [ 0 .. 100 ]

行動コスト

required
object (SaveData.TargetTypeData)

対象指定

{
  • "Accuracy": 100,
  • "Damage": 9999,
  • "AttackCount": 1,
  • "Element": "NONE",
  • "AttackCategory": {
    • "Type": "string",
    • "Range": "MELEE",
    • "Label": "string"
    },
  • "Cost": 100,
  • "TargetType": {
    • "TargetGroup": "ENEMY",
    • "TargetNum": "SINGLE"
    }
}

SaveData.SaveData

version
required
string
Value: "1.0.0"

セーブデータのバージョン。現在は "1.0.0" のみ

timestamp
required
string <date-time>

保存日時 (RFC3339形式)

required
object

ワールドデータ

checksum
required
string

データ改ざん検知用SHA-256ハッシュ値

{
  • "version": "1.0.0",
  • "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "world": {
    • "entities": [
      • {
        • "stable_id": {
          • "index": 0,
          • "generation": 0
          },
        • "components": {
          • "Player": { },
          • "FactionAllyData": { },
          • "LocationInBackpack": {
            • "OwnerRef": {
              • "index": 0,
              • "generation": 0
              }

              },

            • "Current": 0.1
            },
